Tian 'Sebastian' Xia

Mobile App Software Engineer

Insta360 Software Engineer, building the HarmonyOS application and the Android cloud storage service client.

Portfolio

Insta360 HarmonyOS App

Providing basic camera connectivity and panorama video editing features by utilising ArkTS and KMP.

ArkTSKMPHarmonyOS

HarmonyOS 6.0 Mood Match Theme

Designed and implemented a declarative syntax to describe 3D model loading and animation control in HMOS ThemeEngine.

ArkTSHarmonyOSThemeEngine

Partial AOD One-mirror

Developed the animation routine from the customised AOD to the lockscreen in HarmonyOS.

ArkTSHarmonyOSAnimation

Pura X Sticker Theme

Architected and developed the first version of sticker theme exclusively for Huawei Pura X, featuring system-data driven stickers and 2D physics effects.

ArkTSHarmonyOSThemeEngine

HarmonyOS NEXT Wallpaper Basic Experience

Developed animation routines for wallpaper and theme display including transitions between AOD, lockscreen and launcher. Built a declarative UI framework that drives millions of online themes and official themes.

ArkTSHarmonyOSThemeEngineAnimation

Self-adaptive UI Engine (XLayout)

First launched in Mate Xs 2, providing a system-wide solution to adapt application UI on foldable devices, requiring no code changes from third-party developers.

HarmonyOSFoldableUI Framework
